title: Started my trading account in February, here’s where I’m at
author: Aggravating-Ebb-2580
selftext:
Wanted to share a milestone. Started this account back in February with the goal of staying consistent and not blowing up like I had before.

No moonshots, no gambling just slow and steady execution.

Results so far:

	•	Return YTD: +29.52%

	•	Max Monthly Return: +24.54% (April is looking strong)

	•	Every week has been green since I started

February was basically flat while I found my footing. March started clicking. April has been the best month yet.

Still a long way to go but wanted to post this as a checkpoint mostly to hold myself accountable.

Will keep updating. Happy to answer questions on approach/strategy. 😊

comments.author: parttimeinvestornerd
comments.body: What are you using ? Is it a ML , rule based ?

replies.author: Aggravating-Ebb-2580
replies.body: Its proper risk management and semi auto strategy. DM to learn more
